name: Whats' New' Sorting Option
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By default, we are using the most updated date between "},{"text":"variant.created_at","code":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"product.published_at","code":true},{"text":" dates. However, it's possible to override the default setting and use the following:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"only "},{"text":"created_at","code":true},{"text":" on product level"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"only "},{"text":"updated_at","code":true},{"text":" on product level"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"only "},{"text":"created_at","code":true},{"text":" on variant level"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"only "},{"text":"updated_at","code":true},{"text":" on variant level"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
